keyframes.sds-fanSpread1: @keyframes sds-fanSpread1 { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); opacity: 0; } 100% { transform: rotate(-2deg);  opacity: 1; } }
keyframes.sds-fanSpread2: @keyframes sds-fanSpread2 { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); opacity: 0; } 100% { transform: rotate(-8deg);  opacity: 1; } }
keyframes.sds-fanSpread3: @keyframes sds-fanSpread3 { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); opacity: 0; } 100% { transform: rotate(-14deg); opacity: 1; } }
keyframes.sds-fanSpread4: @keyframes sds-fanSpread4 { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); opacity: 0; } 100% { transform: rotate(-20deg); opacity: 1; } }
keyframes.sds-ldIsocube: @keyframes sds-ldIsocube { to { transform: perspective(60px) rotateX(-22deg) rotateY(360deg); } }
